items.title: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
items.raw_content: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.
items.ai_summary: 缅甸前领导人昂山素季被军方转移至软禁。

items.title: Public told 'be alert, not alarmed' as terror threat level raised after Golders Green attack
items.raw_content: The UK's threat level has been lifted from "substantial" to "severe" for the first time in more than four years.
items.ai_summary: 英国将恐怖威胁等级提升至“严重”，呼吁公众保持警惕但不必恐慌。

items.title: Newspaper headlines: 'PM vows to act' and 'Brace for more terror attacks'
items.raw_content: The main story for many of the papers continues to be the knife attack in Golders Green on Wednesday.
items.ai_summary: 英国报纸头条：首相誓言采取行动，民众需警惕更多恐怖袭击。

items.title: Trump signs bill to end record shutdown over immigration enforcement
items.raw_content: The shutdown caused chaos in airports across the US as politicians feuded over funds for Trump's immigration crackdown.
items.ai_summary: 特朗普签署法案结束因移民执法争议导致的创纪录政府停摆。

items.title: Met chief defends knife attack officers after Greens criticism
items.raw_content: Sir Mark Rowley says he is "disappointed" that Green Party leader Zack Polanski shared a post condemning how police subdued the suspect.
items.ai_summary: 伦敦警察局局长为制服持刀嫌疑人的警官辩护，对绿党领袖的批评表示失望。

items.title: New footage shows how Trump dinner gunman charged through security in four seconds
items.raw_content: The CCTV shows an officer draw a firearm and open fire as the suspect sprints past.
items.ai_summary: 新监控显示特朗普晚宴枪手仅用4秒冲过安保线。

items.title: The struggle to get hold of medication in England is set to get worse
items.raw_content: People living with conditions include heart problems, stroke risks, eye infections and bipolar are unable to get hold of the drugs they rely on.
items.ai_summary: 英格兰患者获取药物的困难将加剧，涉及心脏病、中风、眼部感染和双相情感障碍等疾病。

items.title: Oscar goes missing after Academy Award winner is blocked from taking it on flight
items.raw_content: The airline said it regrets the situation and was doing an urgent "comprehensive internal search" for the award.
items.ai_summary: 一位奥斯卡奖得主因航班不允许携带小金人而丢失奖杯，航空公司正紧急寻找。

items.title: Chippies sell catfish as 'traditional fish supper'
items.raw_content: A BBC investigation finds chip shop owners passing off cheaper species as "traditional fish and chips".
items.ai_summary: BBC调查发现，一些炸鱼薯条店用便宜的鲶鱼冒充传统鱼类出售。

items.title: King arrives in Bermuda after ending US trip with visit to small town America
items.raw_content: On the final day of the state visit, the royal couple headed to Virginia for a more informal experience of the US.
items.ai_summary: 国王在结束美国之行后抵达百慕大，此前与王后在弗吉尼亚进行了非正式访问。
